title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Nike India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Nike India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!
